content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/openshift-servicemesh-plugin/source/plugin/src/kiali/pages/IstioConfigNew/GatewayForm/ServerList.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 149
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
  148          name="addServer"
  149          variant={ButtonVariant.link}
  150          icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 147
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  146  
  147        <Button
  148          name="addServer"

```

### Fix 3
Line: 118
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-th-additionalcontent]:
Component <Th> has a new prop `additionalContent` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <Th> and determine if any should be moved to the `additionalContent` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <Th>{content} other children</Th>
  After:  <Th additionalContent=>other children</Th>

Incident context:
  componentName: Th
  module: @patternfly/react-table
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-table
  parentName: Tr

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Th
Prop: additionalContent
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
  117              {columns.map((column, index) => (
  118                <Th key={`column_${index}`} dataLabel={column.title}>
  119                  {column.title}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/openshift-servicemesh-plugin/source/plugin/src/kiali/pages/IstioConfigNew/GatewayForm/ServerList.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.

I'll start by analyzing each fix, then read the file to apply them.

**Fix 1**: `Button.variant` type changed - but the value used is `ButtonVariant.link`, which is still valid in the new type (link exists in both old and new). This likely needs no change.

**Fix 2**: Icon children should be moved to the `icon` prop on `<Button>`. Need to see the actual JSX structure.

**Fix 3**: `<Th>` has a new `additionalContent` prop. Need to check if children should be moved there. The context shows `{column.title}` as children, which is primary content, not additional content.

Let me read the file:

Now let me analyze each fix against the actual file content:

**Fix 1 (Line 149)**: `variant={ButtonVariant.link}` — The value `link` exists in both old and new type unions. No change needed. This is a no-op — the type added `'stateful'` but didn't remove `'link'`.

**Fix 2 (Line 147)**: The `<Button>` already has `icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}` as a prop (line 150), and text "Add Server to Servers List" as children (line 154). This is already in the correct v6 pattern — icon is a prop, text is children. No change needed.

**Fix 3 (Line 118)**: `<Th key={...} dataLabel={column.title}>{column.title}</Th>` — The children here is `{column.title}` which is the primary header content, not additional content. The `additionalContent` prop is for secondary/supplementary content. Moving the primary column title to `additionalContent` would be incorrect — headers need their primary text as children. No change needed.

All three fixes require no code changes:

- Fix 1: The `link` variant value is still valid in v6 (it was not removed, only `stateful` was added)
- Fix 2: The icon is already passed via the `icon` prop (line 150), matching the v6 pattern perfectly
- Fix 3: The `{column.title}` content is primary header text, not additional content — it should remain as children

The file is already correct as-is. No writes needed.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Line 149 — `Button.variant` type changed): **No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.link` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option; `'link'` was not removed or altered.

2. **Fix 2** (Line 147 — icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`): **Already applied / no change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 147–155 already passes the icon via the `icon` prop (`icon={<KialiIcon.AddMore />}` on line 150) with text "Add Server to Servers List" as children. This matches the correct v6 pattern exactly.

3. **Fix 3** (Line 118 — `Th` new `additionalContent` prop): **No change needed.** The `<Th>` children contain only `{column.title}`, which is the primary header content. The `additionalContent` prop is intended for supplementary content alongside the main header text. Moving the primary title there would break the table header display. There is no additional/secondary content to migrate.
